content.title:
More Than Concrete,
It's Confidence.
content.description:
Whether it's a custom driveway, patio, or complete backyard transformation, Maxima Concrete delivers lasting beauty and performance.

With 20+ years of experience, licensed & insured professionals, and a commitment to quality — we build spaces that stand the test of time.

items.question: What sports can a concrete court be used for?
items.answer: Basketball, pickleball, tennis, and multi-sport play — we build courts sized and finished for your game.

items.question: How thick is a concrete sport court?
items.answer: Most courts are poured 4–5 inches thick with reinforcement to handle years of active use.

items.question: Can the court be painted or lined?
items.answer: Yes. We can coordinate colored coatings and game lines to finish your court for play.

items.question: Do you offer free sport court estimates?
items.answer: Yes. We provide free consultations and estimates throughout Central Ohio.
